result.summary: Found 2 visual issues. The most noticeable problem is the fixed bottom navigation overlapping the content area, and there are also clipped horizontal items on the right edge of some rows.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation bar overlaps the game grid, cutting off the lower row of tiles and making parts of the content hard to view or tap.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding/margin to the main content area or move the bottom navigation out of the content flow so nothing is hidden behind it.

issues.description: Several horizontally arranged items are clipped at the right edge of the screen, including category chips and game tiles, leaving partially visible cards.
issues.suggestion: Adjust horizontal spacing/widths or add clearer scroll affordance so the last items are either fully visible or intentionally presented as a scrollable carousel.
